top.title: Virus-hit cruise ship arrives in Tenerife as medics await passengers
top.summary: The BBC's Sarah Rainsford reports from Tenerife where the MV Hondius has arrived, after a deadly hantavirus outbreak.

top.title: Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'
top.summary: The Russian leader sees potential for Ukraine negotiations, but condemns the West's backing for President Zelensky.

top.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes killed 39
top.summary: Israel and Hezbollah have continued to trade fire despite a ceasefire deal being announced last month.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

top.title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
top.summary: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

top.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
top.summary: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
